message: Hello! I'm ready to trade. I'm looking for mutually beneficial exchanges throughout our 20 rounds together. Let's aim for fair prices that allow us both to profit consistently. What price range works for you?
Hi! I want to trade every round too, but my budget is quite limited. I'm hoping to trade somewhere around 30 to 40. Does that range work for your costs?
The previous ask was a bit high for me. Could you consider lowering your price toward 40 so we can reach a deal? I am eager to trade consistently if we can find a middle ground.

I appreciate your interest in consistent trades. My cost is 44, so I need at least that to break even. Could you meet me around 45-47? That gives us both reasonable profit margins. Let's find a sustainable price
We were so close last round - just 1 apart! I'll lower my ask slightly this time. If you keep your bid around 46-47, we can lock in consistent trades for the remaining 18 rounds. Let's not miss
Deal! I will bid 47 this round to make sure we finally match. Please lower your ask to 46 or 47 as promised. Let's lock this in and trade consistently for all remaining rounds.
Great trade! Let's stick with 47 for the rest of the rounds to ensure consistent, mutually beneficial trades for both of us.
Perfect! The 47 price works well for both of us. I'll keep my ask at 47 for consistent trades. Let's maintain this agreement for all remaining rounds - reliable profits for us both!
